_comment_kinds: Allowed kind values: skill, agent, cargo-test, script, manual, doc-section.

steps: Run: rg -n "addEventListener\('keydown'" src/ — expect exactly one match, inside src/lib/shortcuts/dispatcher.ts.

Run: rg -n "from '.*lib/shortcuts'" src/ — expect imports from src/components/editor/EditorView.tsx, src/components/editor/TranscriptEditor.tsx, src/App.tsx, and src/components/modals/ShortcutsCheatsheet.tsx.
Open src/lib/shortcuts/registry.ts and confirm a single exported `shortcuts` array is the only place chord strings + description keys appear.
Run: rg -n "Ctrl\+|Cmd\+|Shift\+" src/components src/App.tsx — any literal chord strings outside src/lib/shortcuts/ are a failure.
Launch Toaster via scripts/launch-toaster-monitored.ps1 and open eval/fixtures/toaster_example.mp4.
Click into the transcript area to ensure focus is outside any text input.
Press ? (Shift+/) — cheatsheet modal appears.
Press Esc — modal dismisses; confirm the editor word selection from before opening the modal is still intact (selection was not cleared).
Press Ctrl+/ — modal appears again.
Click outside the modal content — modal dismisses.
Focus the Find box (Ctrl/Cmd+F), type '?' — modal must NOT open.
Launch Toaster and open eval/fixtures/toaster_example.mp4.
Open the cheatsheet (press ?).
Confirm three group headings render: Editor, Playback, Navigation.
Cross-check the listed chords against the current src/lib/shortcuts/registry.ts entries — every entry must be visible, none extra.
Press each listed chord in turn and confirm the documented action fires (e.g. Ctrl+D deletes, Space toggles play, Ctrl+Z undoes).
On Windows (or Linux) launch Toaster, open the cheatsheet, confirm chords render with 'Ctrl' (e.g. 'Ctrl+Z' for undo, 'Ctrl+Shift+D' for debug toggle).
On macOS launch Toaster, open the cheatsheet, confirm the same entries render with 'Cmd' (e.g. 'Cmd+Z', 'Cmd+Shift+D').

If only one platform is available, run the macOS path via navigator.platform override in the webview dev console (set `Object.defineProperty(navigator,'platform',{value:'MacIntel'})`, close/reopen modal) and confirm chords switch to Cmd on the next render.

Add a throwaway entry to src/lib/shortcuts/registry.ts (e.g. id: 'throwaway-demo', group: 'navigation', keys: { mac: 'Cmd+Shift+T', other: 'Ctrl+Shift+T' }, action: noop, descriptionKey: 'shortcuts.descriptions.throwawayDemo') and add the matching i18n key to all locales.
Launch Toaster, open the cheatsheet, confirm the throwaway entry is visible under Navigation and pressing its chord invokes the noop without error.
Remove the throwaway entry from registry.ts AND the i18n keys in one edit.
Rebuild/hot-reload, reopen the cheatsheet. Confirm the entry is gone from the visible list and pressing the chord has no effect — no other file was edited to achieve this.
Run: bun scripts/check-translations.ts — must exit 0.
